_comment: Project-local MCP server config for Cursor. The Claude Code harness uses figma MCP tools (mcp__figma__*) — wire the same Figma MCP server here so Cursor's agent has equivalent tool access. Cursor reads this file on startup. The Figma server requires a personal access token; set FIGMA_API_TOKEN in your shell environment or replace the env block below with a static value (DO NOT commit a real token).
